digest.en: US envoy Jared Kushner and investor Jason Witkoff are heading to Pakistan for negotiations. Iran's top diplomat is also set to travel to Pakistan for talks on a ceasefire with the US. The developments come as the US and Iran remain locked in a standoff in the Strait of Hormuz.
digest.hi: विदेश मंत्री जयशंकर ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र में शांति स्थापना के महत्व पर जोर दिया। उन्होंने कहा कि शांति स्थापना के लिए एक मजबूत और प्रभावी ढांचे की आवश्यकता है। भारत ने सुरक्षा परिषद के ढांचे में सुधार की मांग की है।

articles.title: U.S. Is Said to Be Sending Kushner and Witkoff to Negotiations in Pakistan
articles.summary: The Israeli military extended its truce with Lebanon by three weeks, despite striking Hezbollah targets on Friday. The cease-fire aims to end the war in Iran. The Israeli military said it had struck Hezbollah targets on Friday, but its truce with Lebanon appeared to be holding.

articles.title: Top Iran diplomat set to travel to Pakistan for talks on ceasefire with US
articles.summary: The talks come amid ongoing tensions between Iran and the US. Live updates: Iran's top diplomat is expected to travel to Pakistan by this weekend for talks about a ceasefire with the US AP News.

articles.title: Iran’s top diplomat heads to Pakistan as fresh talks expected, sources say
articles.summary: Iran's top diplomat is heading to Pakistan for fresh talks, sources say. Live updates: Iran’s top diplomat heads to Pakistan as fresh talks expected, sources say CNN.

articles.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire by three weeks after US-brokered talks. U. S. President Donald Trump announces the development after meeting representatives from both countries in Washington. Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks.

articles.title: Turkish foreign minister says Israel has become ‘direct threat to global security,’ urges
articles.summary: Turkey's foreign minister called Israel a direct threat to global security, urging a collective response. Turkish foreign minister says Israel has become ‘direct threat to global security,’ urges 'collective response' Anadolu Ajansı.

articles.title: U.S. and Iran remain locked in Strait of Hormuz standoff, Israel launches new strikes in Lebanon
articles.summary: The US and Iran remain in a standoff in the Strait of Hormuz, with Hezbollah rejecting a Lebanon ceasefire. Live Updates: U. S. and Iran remain locked in Strait of Hormuz standoff, Hezbollah rejects Lebanon ceasefire CBS News.

articles.title: Hegseth warns Iran that US forces will ‘shoot to destroy’ any ships laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: US forces will shoot to destroy any Iranian ships laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. Hegseth warns Iran that US forces will ‘shoot to destroy’ any ships laying mines in Strait of Hormuz Fox News.

articles.title: Pentagon email floats suspending Spain from NATO, other steps over Iran rift, source says
articles.summary: A Pentagon email suggested suspending Spain from NATO due to a rift over Iran, a source said. Exclusive: Pentagon email floats suspending Spain from NATO, other steps over Iran rift, source says Reuters.

articles.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
articles.summary: The UK government insists Falklands sovereignty rests with the UK after a Pentagon report suggested the US might reconsider its position in response to the UK's refusal to join the Iran war.

articles.title: US has three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for first time since 2003
articles.summary: The US has deployed three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for the first time since 2003, as part of a blockade on Iran's ports, amid a fragile truce and escalating tensions.

articles.title: PM Sanchez rebuffs US idea of suspending Spain from NATO
articles.summary: Spanish Prime Minister Sanchez rejected a reported US plan to suspend Spain from NATO over its opposition to the war on Iran, stating the country's position remains unchanged. PM Sanchez responded to reports that the US may suspend Madrid from NATO over its opposition to the war on Iran.

articles.title: Is the U.S. Trying to Suspend Spain From NATO? Sánchez Addresses Reported Pentagon Email
articles.summary: Spanish Prime Minister Sanchez denied a reported US plan to suspend Spain from NATO, saying the country's position on the Iran war remains firm and unchanged. Is the U. S. Trying to Suspend Spain From NATO?

articles.title: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi to reach Pakistan tonight for talks with U.S.: report
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is set to arrive in Pakistan tonight for talks with the US, with a US delegation likely to follow on April 25 to discuss a framework for negotiations.

articles.title: UN says Israeli strikes in Lebanon, Hezbollah rockets into Israel may breach international law
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Lebanon and Hezbollah rockets into Israel may breach international law according to the UN. UN says Israeli strikes in Lebanon, Hezbollah rockets into Israel may breach international law Reuters.

articles.title: How Iran is wielding the Strait of Hormuz as leverage
articles.summary: Iran is using the Strait of Hormuz as leverage. The US wants to negotiate. While the US is signaling a desire to negotiate, Iranians are playing for time. counting on the world's dependence on Persian Gulf energy exports and their strongest weapon, the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Iran-Iraq Tanker War redux? Why the Strait of Hormuz crisis is different
articles.summary: The Strait of Hormuz crisis is different from the 1980s Tanker War. The Tanker War between Iran and Iraq in the 1980s also disrupted global shipping. But the situation today is different.

articles.title: Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu says he received treatment for prostate cancer
articles.summary: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu received radiation therapy for early-stage prostate cancer. Netanyahu's medical report said the Israeli leader was treated with radiation therapy for early-stage prostate cancer. Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu says he received treatment for prostate cancer.

articles.title: Sally Rooney, Greta Thunberg back Palestine Action before court date
articles.summary: Over 130 public figures including Sally Rooney and Greta Thunberg support Palestine Action. More than 130 public figures express support for the proscribed group as the UK prepares for another legal fight.

articles.title: US Justice Department to close investigation into Fed Chair Powell, top federal prosecutor says
articles.summary: The US Justice Department closed its investigation into Fed Chair Powell. The investigation's closure removes one more obstacle to the confirmation of Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve.

articles.title: Putin may attend G20 summit in Miami after U.S. invitation: Kremlin
articles.summary: Putin may attend the G20 summit in Miami after a US invitation. The Russian President has not attended a G20 summit since 2019; Trump has adopted a more friendly attitude towards Russia in his second term in office.

articles.title: PM Sanchez sidesteps Spain-U.S. dispute at NATO, brushing off reported Pentagon email
articles.summary: Spain's PM Sanchez avoided discussing a reported US email about suspending Spain from NATO. Pentagon is reported to be mulling whether to suspend Spain from NATO, according to an unidentified U. S.

articles.title: युद्ध-संघर्ष... यूएन चार्टर में शांति स्थापना का जिक्र, विदेश मंत्री जयशंकर ने दुनिया के सामने रखी

articles.title: होर्मुज़ स्ट्रेटः कितनी ख़तरनाक होती हैं समुद्री बारूदी सुरंगें, इन्हें हटाना क्यों मुश्किल काम

articles.title: ईरानी क्राउन प्रिंस पहलवी फेंका गया लाल रंग, युद्धविराम को लेकर कूटनीति पर उठाए थे सवाल

articles.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि वह ईरान के साथ युद्ध के लिए तैयार हैं. ईरान ने चेतावनी दी कि अगर अमेरिका ने हमला किया तो वह एक और नरक बनाएंगे. यह बयान अमेरिका-ईरान संघर्ष के बीच आया है.

articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरान ने कई बार संघर्ष-विराम तोड़ा है. उनके बयान के बाद इस्लामाबाद में होने वाली शांति वार्ता पर संकट के बादल मंडरा रहे हैं. ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है.
